content:
title: Branch Protection to SOC 2 Mapping
metadata:
  type: MappingDocument
  id: ampel-bp-soc2
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Maps AMPEL branch protection controls to SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
  author:
    id: complytime
    name: ComplyTime
    type: Software Assisted
  mapping-references:
    - id: ampel-bp
      title: AMPEL Branch Protection Controls
      version: 1.0.0
    - id: soc2-tsc
      title: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
      version: '2017'
source-reference:
  entry-type: Control
  reference-id: ampel-bp
target-reference:
  entry-type: AssessmentRequirement
  reference-id: soc2-tsc
mappings:
  - id: bp1-to-soc2
    source: BP-1
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: CC8.1
        strength: 9
        confidence-level: High
        rationale: >-
          The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures,
          documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure,
          data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.
      - entry-id: CC6.1
        strength: 6
        confidence-level: Medium
        rationale: >-
          The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure,
          and architectures over protected information assets.
  - id: bp2-to-soc2
    source: BP-2
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: CC8.1
        strength: 8
        confidence-level: High
  - id: bp3-to-soc2
    source: BP-3
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: CC8.1
        strength: 7
        confidence-level: Medium
  - id: bp4-to-soc2
    source: BP-4
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: CC8.1
        strength: 8
        confidence-level: High
      - entry-id: CC6.1
        strength: 7
        confidence-level: Medium
  - id: bp5-to-soc2
    source: BP-5
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: CC8.1
        strength: 6
        confidence-level: Medium
